description: Composition White shirt with maroon stripes made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with a front buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not soak or bleach Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron; do not iron on print/embroidery Created from cotton fabric, this shirt from genesis makes for an easy addition to your wardrobe. Team it with jeans for an urban semi-formal style. Add on suede shoes, a blazer and classy accessories for a sophisticated look. Model statistics The product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
